ground_truth.review:
Pho, summer rolls, iced coffee, vermicelli, broken rice plates, all the staples in a quick-service format. Mid-priced and great for lunch. Come right when they open at 11:30 to beat the lunch rush.

New digs with a clean restroom. For now.

prediction.review: As a frequent patron and someone who consistently appreciates the cost-effective dining options of 'uBDXcXlLR9IuRV1N2m0SPQ', I must say that my experiences have largely been positive. The quick service is commendable, aligning with what I've come to expect from a reliable eatery like Pho.
